The table below shows the number of bags of soil needed for raised garden beds of different sizes. At this rate, how many bags of soil are needed for a garden bed of $30$ cubic feet?

\begin{tabular}{|c|c|}
\hline
\textit{Garden Bed} & \textit{Soil} \\
\textit{(cubic feet)} & \textit{(number of bags)} \\
\hline
15 & 10 \\
\hline
21 & 14 \\
\hline
30 & \\
\hline
45 & 30 \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
